title.ko: 지중 또는 암석의 굴착; 채굴정에서의 오일, 가스, 물, 용해성 또는 용융성 물질 또는 광물 슬러리의 채취
title.en: EARTH OR ROCK DRILLING; OBTAINING OIL, GAS, WATER, SOLUBLE OR MELTABLE MATERIALS OR A SLURRY OF MINERALS FROM WELLS

definition.ko: 굴착을 위한 장치 또는 방법 1/00 - 7/00 굴착용 공구; 그를 위한 부속품 10/00, 11/00, 12/00 굴착을 위한 기타 기기 또는 부품; 갱정용 기기 또는 갱정의 유지 기중기(derrick); 드릴로드(drilling rod) 또는 그 유사한 것 15/00; 17/00; 19/00 갱정의 수세, 또는 세척; 밀봉; 가열 또는 냉각 21/00, 37/00, 33/00, 36/00 밸브의 배치; 방화(fire-fighting) 34/00, 35/00 기타 장치 또는 세부 23/00 - 31/00, 40/00, 41/00 우물로부터의 유체의 채취 43/00 제어; 조사 또는 시험 44/00, 45/00 - 49/00

title.ko: 충격식 굴착
title.en: Methods or apparatus for drilling

title.ko: 충격식 굴착
title.en: Percussion drilling
Surface drives for drop hammers, e.g. with a cable
Devices for reversing the movement of the rod or cable at the surface

title.ko: 왕복 충격 부재에 의한 것(1/02, 1/38이 우선)
title.en: with a reciprocating impulse member (E21B0001020000, E21B0001380000 take precedence)
driven by a rotating mechanism
with spring-mounted reciprocating masses, e.g. with air cushion
with elastic joining of the drive to the push-rod by double buffer springs
formed as centrifugal hammers
driven by electromagnets
the impulse member being a piston driven directly by fluid pressure
by liquid pressure
working with pulses
by air, steam or gas pressure
working with pulses
the impulse member being a piston of an internal-combustion engine
Tool-carrier piston type, i.e. in which the tool is connected to an impulse member
Hammer piston type, i.e. in which the tool bit or anvil is hit by an impulse member
Rotary drilling
Surface drives for rotary drilling
with a to-and-fro rotation of the tool
with an intermittent unidirectional rotation of the tool
with slipping or elastic transmission
Rotary tables
Adaptation of rotary draw works to drive rotary tables

title.ko: 굴착을 위해 시추공 속에서 구동하는 것
title.en: Drives for drilling, used in the borehole
Fluid rotary type drives

title.ko: 전기 구동 장치
title.en: Electric drives (E21B0004120000 takes precedence)

title.ko: 다운홀 충격 수단, 예. 해머 (보링 램 E21B11/02)
title.en: Down-hole impacting means, e.g. hammers (boring rams E21B0011020000)
impact being obtained by gravity only, e.g. with lost-motion connection
continuous unidirectional rotary motion of shaft or drilling pipe effecting consecutive impacts
Electrically operated hammers
Fluid operated hammers

title.ko: 복수의 다운홀식 구동 장치, 예. 충격 회전식 굴착용(4/10이 우선); 멀티-비트(multi-bit)를 갖는 굴착 장치를 위한 구동 장치
title.en: Plural down-hole drives, e.g. for combined percussion and rotary drilling (E21B0004100000 takes precedence); Drives for multi-bit drilling units
Anchoring or feeding in the borehole

title.ko: 지상의 구동 수단과 조합된 것(4/10이 우선)
title.en: combined with surface drive (E21B0004100000 takes precedence)
Drives for drilling with combined rotary and percussive action
the rotation being continuous
Separate drives for percussion and rotation
the rotation being intermittent, e.g. obtained by a ratchet device
Separate drives for percussion and rotation

title.ko: 굴착을 위한 특수 방법 또는 장치
title.en: Special methods or apparatus for drilling
Drilling rigs characterised by means for land transport, e.g. skid mounting or wheel mounting
Directional drilling
Deflecting the direction of boreholes
Special apparatus for deflecting the boring, e.g. special drill bits, knuckle joints or whipstocks
Correction of deflected boreholes

title.ko: 수중 굴착 (상하동 보상 장치 E21B19/09)
title.en: Underwater drilling  (using heave compensators E21B0019090000)
with underwater tool drive prime mover, e.g. portable drilling rigs for use on underwater floors
from floating support with independent underwater anchored guide base
from underwater buoyant support

title.ko: 부유하지 않는 지지대에서 행하는 것(7/124가 우선)
title.en: from non-buoyant support (E21B0007124000 takes precedence)
Drilling by use of heat, e.g. flame drilling
of electrically generated heat
Applying separate balls or pellets by the pressure of the drill, so-called shot-drilling

title.ko: 연행된 펠릿을 가지거나 가지지 않는 액체 또는 가스 제트에 의한 시추 (E21B7/14가 우선)
title.en: Drilling by liquid or gas jets, with or without entrained pellets (E21B0007140000 takes precedence)
Driving or forcing casings or pipes into boreholes, e.g. sinking; Simultaneously drilling and casing boreholes

title.ko: 진동하는 수단, 예. 불평형 중추를 사용한 굴착(충격식 굴착 1/00)
title.en: Drilling using vibrating or oscillating means, e.g. out-of-balance masses (percussion drilling E21B0001000000)

title.ko: 흙을 제거하지 않고 굴착하는 것. 예. 자기 추진식 굴착 장치에 의한 것 (E21B7/30 이 우선)
title.en: Drilling without earth removal, e.g. with self-propelled burrowing devices (E21B0007300000 takes precedence)
Enlarging drilled holes, e.g. by counterboring
without earth removal

title.ko: 드릴 비트(굴착 방향을 경사지게 하기 위하여 특별히 사용되는 것 7/08; 물질을 수집하기 위한 수단을 가지는 드릴 비트 27/00)
title.en: Drilling tools

title.ko: 드릴 비트(굴착 방향을 경사지게 하기 위하여 특별히 사용되는 것 7/08; 물질을 수집하기 위한 수단을 가지는 드릴 비트 27/00)
title.en: Drill bits (specially adapted for deflecting the direction of boring E21B0007080000;with means for collecting substances E21B0027000000)

title.ko: 코어 비트 (내마모성의 부분에 특징이 있는 것 E21B10/48)
title.en: Core bits  (characterised by wear resisting parts E21B0010480000)
with core destroying means
Roller core bits

title.ko: 롤러형 비트 (E21B10/26이 우선; 롤러 코어 비트 E21B10/06; 내마모성의 부분에 특징이 있는 것 E21B10/50)
title.en: Roller bits  (E21B0010260000 takes precedence; roller core bits E21B0010060000; characterised by wear resisting parts E21B0010500000)
with roller axle supported at both ends
with disc cutters
combined with non-rolling cutters other than of leading-portion type
characterised by tooth form or arrangement
characterised by conduits or nozzles for drilling fluids
characterised by detachable or adjustable parts, e.g. legs or axles

title.ko: 베어링, 윤활 또는 실링의 세부에 의하여 특징지워진 것
title.en: characterised by bearing, lubrication or sealing details
with drilling fluid supply to the bearings

title.ko: 윤활의 세부에 의하여 특징지워진 것(10/23가 우선)
title.en: characterised by lubricating details (E21B0010230000 takes precedence)
characterised by sealing details

title.ko: 선단부를 갖는 드릴 비트, 즉. 파일럿 커터를 갖는 드릴 비트; 시추공을 확대하기 위한 드릴 비트, 예. 리머 (선단 부분을 가지는 충격식 드릴 비트 E21B10/40)
title.en: Drill bits with leading portion, i.e. drill bits with a pilot cutter; Drill bits for enlarging the borehole, e.g. reamers (percussion drill bits with leading portion E21B0010400000)
with non-expansible roller cutters
Longitudinal axis roller reamers, e.g. reamer stabilisers
with expansible cutting tools
of roller-cutter type

title.ko: 충격식 드릴 비트(내마모성의 부분에 의하여 특징지워진 것 10/46)
title.en: Percussion drill bits (characterised by wear resisting parts E21B0010460000)
characterised by conduits or nozzles for drilling fluids
with leading portion

title.ko: 치(teeth), 블레이드 또는 다른 절단 요소를 갖는 회전식(rotary drag type) 드릴비트, 예. 포크식 비트, 어미형(魚尾)형 비트(내마모성의 부분에 의하여 특징지워진 것10/46, 굴착유체를 위한 도관 또는 노즐에 의해 특징지워진 것 10/60, 분리 가능한 요소에 의해 특징지워진 것 10/62)
title.en: Rotary drag type drill bits with teeth, blades or like cutting elements, e.g. fork-type bits, fish tail bits (characterised by wear resisting parts E21B0010460000, by conduits or nozzles for drilling fluid E21B0010600000, by detachable parts E21B0010620000)
characterised by the arrangement of teeth or other cutting elements

title.ko: 나선상의 운반 부분을 갖는 비트, 예. 스크류형 비트; 선단 부분을 또는 분리 가능한 부분을 갖는 오거 (E21B10/42가 우선)
title.en: Bits with helical conveying portion, e.g. screw type bits; Augers with leading portion or with detachable parts (E21B0010420000 takes precedence)

title.ko: 내마모성에 의하여 특징지워진 것, 예. 다이아몬드 인서트
title.en: characterised by wear resisting parts, e.g. diamond inserts
the bit being of core type
the bit being of roller type
with chisel- or button-type inserts
the bit being of the rotary drag type, e.g. fork-type bits
with preformed cutting elements

title.ko: 버턴형의 인서트(10/52가 우선)
title.en: Button-type inserts (E21B0010520000 takes precedence)
with preformed cutting elements mounted on a distinct support, e.g. polycrystalline inserts
characterised by support details, e.g. the substrate construction or the interface between the substrate and the cutting element

title.ko: 치즐형 삽입물 (E21B10/52가 우선)
title.en: Chisel-type inserts (E21B0010520000 takes precedence)

title.ko: 굴착 유체용 도관 또는 노즐에 의하여 특징지워진 것(롤러 비트용 10/18; 충격식 드릴 비트용 10/38)
title.en: characterised by conduits or nozzles for drilling fluids (for roller bits E21B0010180000;for percussion drill bits E21B0010380000)
characterised by nozzle structure

title.ko: 부분에 의해 특징지워진 것 예. 분리 또는 조절 가능한 절단 요소(10/64가 우선; 롤러 비트용 10/20; 오거용 10/44)
title.en: characterised by parts, e.g. cutting elements, which are detachable or adjustable (E21B0010640000 takes precedence;for roller bits E21B0010200000;for augers E21B0010440000)
with plural detachable cutting elements
independently detachable
characterised by the whole or part thereof being insertable into or removable from the borehole without withdrawing the drilling pipe
the cutting element being movable through the drilling pipe and laterally shiftable
Other drilling tools
Boring rams
Boring grabs
with driven cutting chains or similarly-driven tools
Accessories for drilling tools
Wear indicators
Drill bit protectors
Mechanical cleaning devices

title.ko: 굴착 장치를 위한 지지대. 예. 데릭(derrick) 또는 마스트
title.en: Other equipment or details for drilling; Well equipment or well maintenance

title.ko: 굴착 장치를 위한 지지대. 예. 데릭(derrick) 또는 마스트
title.en: Supports for the drilling machine, e.g. derricks or masts

title.ko: 수중 굴착에 특히 적합한 것 (E21B15/04가 우선)
title.en: specially adapted for underwater drilling (E21B0015040000 takes precedence)
specially adapted for directional drilling, e.g. slant hole rigs
Drilling rods or pipes; Flexible drill strings; Kellies; Drill collars; Sucker rods; Casings; Tubings
Risers
Couplings; Joints
between drilling rod or pipe and drill motor, e.g. between drilling rod and hammer
between rod and bit, or between rod and rod
threaded
with locking means
with ribs, pins, or jaws, and complementary grooves or the like, e.g. bayonet catches
Swivel joints
Releasing-joints, e.g. safety joints
Telescoping joints for varying drill string lengths; Shock absorbers
Casing joints
Wear protectors; Centralising devices
Devices for placing or drawing out wear protectors
Casing shoes
Drill collars
Pipes provided with plural fluid passages
Flexible or articulated drilling pipes
Rods or pipes with helical structure

title.ko: 시추공 밖에서의 로드, 케이싱, 튜브 또는 유사한 것의 조작, 예. 데릭 내의 것; 로드 또는 케이블을 공급(feeding) 하기 위한 장치
title.en: Handling rods, casings, tubes or the like outside the borehole, e.g. in the derrick; Apparatus for feeding the rods or cables
Rod or cable suspensions
Hooks
Elevators, i.e. rod- or tube-gripping devices
Slip-type elevators

title.ko: 로드 또는 케이블의 급송 장치 (E21B19/22가 우선; 자동 공급 E21B44/02); 드릴링 공구의 압력을 증가 또는 감소시키기 위한 장치; 로드의 무게 균형을 맞추기 위한 장치)
title.en: Apparatus for feeding the rods or cables (E21B0019220000 takes precedence;automatic feed E21B0044020000); Apparatus for increasing or decreasing the pressure on the drilling tool; Apparatus for counterbalancing the weight of the rods
Screw-and-nut feed mechanisms
Cam, rack or like feed mechanisms
with flexible drawing means, e.g. cables

title.ko: 유체에 의해 작동되는 실린더를 구비한 것(19/084, 19/087, 19/09가 우선)
title.en: with a fluid-actuated cylinder (E21B0019084000, E21B0019087000, E21B0019090000 take precedence)
by means of a swinging arm
with a spring or an additional weight
specially adapted for drilling underwater formations from a floating support using heave compensators supporting the drill string
Slips; Spiders
Rope clamps

title.ko: 로드를 하나의 또는 접속한 길이로 보존하기 위한 랙, 램프, 트로프(troughs) 혹은 빈(bin); 보관 장소와 시추공과의 사이의 조작(19/20, 19/22가 우선)
title.en: Racks, ramps, troughs or bins, for holding the lengths of rod singly or connected; Handling between storage place and borehole (E21B0019200000, E21B0019220000 take precedence)
Racking of rods in horizontal position; Handling between horizontal and vertical position

title.ko: 파이프 커플링 또는 조인트의 연결 또는 분리 (E21B19/20 이 우선)
title.en: Connecting or disconnecting pipe couplings or joints (E21B0019200000 takes precedence)
Connecting or disconnecting drill bit and drilling pipe
Combined feeding from rack and connecting, e.g. automatically
Handling reeled pipe or rod units, e.g. flexible drilling pipes
Guiding or centralising devices for drilling rods or pipes

title.ko: 시추공의 세정을 위한 방법 또는 장치, 예. 모터에 의한 배출 공기의 이용에 의한 것 (플러싱에 의해 시추공에 고착된 물체를 자유롭게 하는 것 E21B31/03)
title.en: Methods or apparatus for flushing boreholes, e.g. by use of exhaust air from motor (freeing objects stuck in boreholes by flushing E21B0031030000)
Arrangements for handling drilling fluids or cuttings outside the borehole, e.g. mud boxes
Means engaging the bore entrance, e.g. hoods for collecting dust
Swivel joints in hose lines
Arrangements for treating drilling fluids outside the borehole
for treating dust-laden gaseous fluids

title.ko: 굴착 유체의 압력 또는 흐름의 제어 또는 감시, 예. 시추공의 자동 충만(充滿), 갱저(坑底) 압력의 자동 제어(그것을 위한 밸브 장치 21/10)
title.en: Controlling or monitoring pressure or flow of drilling fluid, e.g. automatic filling of boreholes, automatic control of bottom pressure (valve arrangements therefor E21B0021100000)
Valves arrangements in drilling-fluid circulation systems
using drilling pipes with plural fluid passages, e.g. closed circulation systems
using liquids and gases, e.g. foams

title.ko: 가스상 유체의 사용에 의한 것 (E21B21/14가 우선)
title.en: using gaseous fluids (E21B0021140000 takes precedence)
Preventing exhaust air from the drill motor from blowing-off towards the working face

title.ko: 시추공 또는 갱정 속에서 공구, 패커(packer) 또는 유사한 것을 치환, 설치, 고정, 해제 또는 제거시키기 위한 장치 (케이싱, 스크린(screen) 또는 라이너(liner)를 설치하는 것 E21B43/10)
title.en: Apparatus for displacing, setting, locking, releasing or removing tools, packers or the like in boreholes or wells  (setting of casings, screens or liners E21B0043100000)

title.ko: 고정용 공구 또는 그와 유사한 것(23/02와 23/06이 우선함; 시추공속에 정착되는 것 4/18)
title.en: for anchoring the tools or the like (E21B0023020000-E21B0023060000 take precedence;anchoring of drives in the borehole E21B0004180000)

title.ko: 설치된 니플(nipple)에 또는 튜빙(tubing)의 인접 부분간의 요소에 공구 또는 그의 유사한 것을 고정하기 위한 것(23/03 ～ 23/06이 우선)
title.en: for locking the tools or the like in landing nipples or in recesses between adjacent sections of tubing (E21B0023030000-E21B0023060000 take precedence)
for setting the tools into, or removing the tools from, laterally offset landing nipples or pockets

title.ko: 유체 수단에 의하여 작동하는 것, 예. 폭발에 의하여 작동하는 것 (E21B23/08이 우선)
title.en: operated by fluid means, e.g. actuated by explosion   (E21B0023080000 takes precedence)
for setting packers
Introducing or running tools by fluid pressure, e.g. through-the-flow-line tool systems
Tools specially adapted therefor
Tool diverters
for displacing a cable or a cable-operated tool, e.g. for logging or perforating operations in deviated wells

title.ko: 흩뜨러지지 않는 코어를 채취 또는 제거하기 위한 장치, 예. 코어 배럴 또는 코어 추출기 (코어 비트 E21B10/02)
title.en: Apparatus for obtaining or removing undisturbed cores, e.g. core barrels or core extractors  (core bits E21B0010020000)
the core receiver being insertable into, or removable from, the borehole without withdrawing the drilling pipe
the core receiver having a core forming cutting edge or element, e.g. punch type core barrels
the core receiver having a flexible liner or inflatable retaining means

title.ko: 코어의 피복, 동결, 고화(固化)(25/06이 우선); 오염되지 않은 코어 또는 지압하에서의 코어의 회수
title.en: Coating, freezing, consolidating cores (E21B0025060000 takes precedence); Recovering uncontaminated cores or cores at formation pressure

title.ko: 코어를 보지(保持) 또는 절단하는 수단이 형성된 것(25/06, 25/08이 우선)
title.en: Formed core retaining or severing means (E21B0025060000, E21B0025080000 take precedence)
of the sliding wedge type
mounted on pivot transverse to core axis
for obtaining oriented cores
the core receiver being specially adapted for operation under water
Containers for collecting or depositing substances in boreholes or wells, e.g. bailers for collecting mud or sand; Drill bits with means for collecting substances, e.g. valve drill bits
Dump bailers, i.e. containers for depositing substances, e.g. cement or acids
where the collecting or depositing means include helical conveying means

title.ko: 시추공 또는 갱정을 위한 진동 발생 장치 예. 자극 생산을 위한 것 (측정 신호를 전송하기 위한 것 E21B47/14; 지구 물리학적 측정을 위한 것 G01V1/02)
title.en: Vibration generating arrangements for boreholes or wells, e.g. for stimulating production (for transmitting measuring-signals E21B0047140000;for geophysical measurements G01V0001020000)

title.ko: 시추공(boreholes) 또는 갱정(well) 속에 설치된 파이프, 패커, 플러그 또는 와이어라인 절단 또는 파괴, 예. 파손된 파이프, 창의 절단; 시추공 또는 갱정 속에서의 파이프 변형; 지중에서의 갱정 케이싱 재조정
title.en: Cutting or destroying pipes, packers, plugs or wire lines, located in boreholes or wells, e.g. cutting of damaged pipes, of windows; Deforming of pipes in boreholes or wells; Reconditioning of well casings while in the ground
by explosives or by thermal or chemical means

title.ko: 와이어 라인 또는 그와 유사한 것의 절단(29/02가 우선)
title.en: Cutting of wire lines or the like (E21B0029020000 takes precedence)

title.ko: 창의 절단, 예. 휩스톡(whipstock) 조작을 위한 경사창 절단 (E21B29/08이 우선)
title.en: Cutting windows, e.g. directional window cutters for whipstock operations (E21B0029080000 takes precedence)
Cutting or deforming pipes to control fluid flow
Reconditioning of well casings, e.g. straightening

title.ko: 수중 설비에 특히 적합한 것(29/08이 우선)
title.en: specially adapted for underwater installations (E21B0029080000 takes precedence)
Fishing for or freeing objects in boreholes or wells
Freeing by flushing
